role_summary: Defines version control exclusion rules to maintain repository cleanliness, security, and environment consistency by filtering out dependencies, build artifacts, IDE configurations, OS-specific files, and sensitive credentials.
extracted_finding: The system employs a polyglot architecture with a Python backend and a Node.js/Vite frontend. It enforces strict secret management by isolating environment configurations (.env.*.local), supports containerized deployments via Docker, and standardizes local development workflows using virtual environments (.venv, .uv), test runners (pytest), and coverage tools. The presence of .claude/ indicates AI-assisted development integration, reflecting a modern DevOps-focused structure prioritizing reproducible builds, cross-platform compatibility, and secure configuration management.
